# Coding Brain

Coding Brain is a local TUI for supervising Codex, Claude Code, and Antigravity CLI through judgment and learning.

Current product boundary:
- Live shows provider-tagged Brain activity and attention, not a session dashboard.
- Review collects denials, corrections, and uncertain decisions worth teaching from.
- Scorecard reports decision quality and learning progress.
- Structured lifecycle, permission, and recovery hooks record bounded activity before richer provider evidence catches up.
- Session switching uses exact provider-qualified Agent Deck navigation, native Claude background attach, or supported terminal focus.
- Guarded tmux actions require current process identity, a unique pane, and prompt revalidation; manual text also requires explicit Live selection.
- Usage/cost tracking is outside the supported product surface; this provider feature adds no usage/cost ingestion or dashboard/view.
- Coding Brain does not provide a mailbox, scheduler, durable task queue, dependency engine, or distributed coordinator.

Current paths:
- User config: $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/coding-brain/config.toml
- User state: $XDG_STATE_HOME/coding-brain/
- Project config: .coding-brain.toml
- Stable project identity: .coding-brain/project.toml

Install and activate:
- cargo install coding-brain
- coding-brain init codex (or claude, antigravity, several names, or all)
- bare interactive init detects providers and asks; provider-less non-interactive init is deprecated Codex compatibility
- coding-brain doctor
- restart configured agents; inspect /hooks for Codex
- coding-brain

Managed provider paths:
- Codex: project .codex/hooks.json or user ~/.codex/hooks.json
- Claude Code: ~/.claude/settings.json
- Antigravity CLI: ~/.gemini/config/hooks.json

The crates.io package, executable, and internal Rust crates use the coding-brain namespace. There is no automatic migration or compatibility executable. Confirmed purge is irreversible; old global data remains available for rollback until purge.

Documentation:
- https://aleadag.github.io/coding-brain/
- https://aleadag.github.io/coding-brain/quickstart/
- https://aleadag.github.io/coding-brain/configuration/
- https://aleadag.github.io/coding-brain/reference/
- https://aleadag.github.io/coding-brain/terminal-support/
- https://aleadag.github.io/coding-brain/troubleshooting/
- https://aleadag.github.io/coding-brain/contributing/
